parameters.query:
WITH paid_cycles AS (
    SELECT
        users_plans.user_id,
        users_plans.plan_id,
        (users_plans.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day')::date AS next_start_date,
        ((users_plans.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day')::date + ((plans.durantio_days - 1) * INTERVAL '1 day'))::date AS next_end_date
    FROM users_plans
    INNER JOIN plans ON plans.id = users_plans.plan_id
    WHERE users_plans.payment_status = 'paid'
),
missing_cycles AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (paid_cycles.user_id, paid_cycles.next_start_date, paid_cycles.next_end_date)
        paid_cycles.user_id,
        paid_cycles.plan_id,
        paid_cycles.next_start_date,
        paid_cycles.next_end_date
    FROM paid_cycles
    LEFT JOIN users_plans
        ON users_plans.user_id = paid_cycles.user_id
       AND users_plans.start_date = paid_cycles.next_start_date
       AND users_plans.end_date = paid_cycles.next_end_date
    WHERE users_plans.id IS NULL
)
INSERT INTO users_plans (user_id, plan_id, start_date, end_date, payment_status)
SELECT
    user_id,
    plan_id,
    next_start_date,
    next_end_date,
    'pending'
FROM missing_cycles
RETURNING id, user_id, start_date, end_date, payment_status;
